title: Tameable Ravagers
description: Serverside mod that allows players to tame ravagers
body:
This mod allows players to tame ravagers using weakness + slowness potions and an enchanted golden apple, similar to villager curing but instantaneous.

The tame ravager is a new entity type and behaves like a horse.

You can `summon` or `kill` them with `tameable_ravagers:ravager`:
`summon ~ ~ ~ tameable_ravagers:ravager`
